calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Arnold Walter Evje, Esq., and Defendant Barryu Hewitt appearing in Pro Per. The parties enter into a stipulation signed by the court, not reported. The Court orders the trial date vacated.
